Welcome to the Taskurai CLI!

Copyright (c) Buildby. All rights reserved.

Usage:
  Taskurai.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --account <account>                                               Taskurai Account Id.
  --instance <instance>                                             Taskurai Instance Id.
  --deployment-mode <Complete|Incremental>                          Deployment mode.
  --interaction-mode <FinalConfirmation|Preview|Silent|StepByStep>  Interaction mode.
  --error-mode <Continue|Rollback|Stop>                             Error mode.
  --display-mode <Medium|Verbose>                                   Display mode.
  --scope <scope>                                                   Deployment scope (Development, Test, Production, ...).
  --variable-overrides <variable-overrides>                         Variable overrides (usage: key1=value1 key2=value2).
  --secret-overrides <secret-overrides>                             Secret overrides (usage: key1=value1 key2=value2).
  --file <file>                                                     Configuration file (Default: currentDirectory/Taskurai.<Scope>.yaml)
  --tenant-id <tenant-id>                                           Service Principle / Workload Identity Tenant Id.
  --client-id <client-id>                                           Service Principle / Workload Identity Id.
  --client-secret <client-secret>                                   Service Principle Secret.
  --version                                                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  cronjob       Manage cron jobs.
  hub           Manage hubs.
  login         Login to Taskurai.
  logout        Logout from Taskurai.
  pat           Manage personal access tokens.
  secret        Manage secrets.
  statestore    Manage state stores.
  subscription  Manage subscription.
  webhook       Manage webhooks.
  worker        Manage workers.
